name: What Is the Minimum Architecture for Prolepsis? Early Irrevocable Commitment Across Tasks in Small Transformers
summary: arXiv:2604.15010v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: When do transformers commit to a decision, and what prevents them from correcting it? We introduce prolepsis: a transformer commits early,...
description: arXiv:2604.15010v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: When do transformers commit to a decision, and what prevents them from correcting it? We introduce prolepsis: a transformer commits early, task-specific attention heads sustain the commitment, and no layer corrects it. Replicating Lindsey et al.'s (2025) planning-site finding on open models (Gemma 2 2B, Llama 3.2 1B), we ask five questio...
author: \'Eric Jacopin
